held_out_queries: Can I submit my RCT empirical study to RER, or review articles only? Does it accept interdisciplinary work?
Is RER review single-blind or double-blind / masked? What must I hide?
Fee/APC, decision timeline, and word limit?

edits.summary: State the review-only scope verbatim (no original empirical research unless in a broader integrative review), interdisciplinary-welcome-if-education-bearing, and solicited-but-refereed special reviews; name the review process as masked (anonymized); add publication facts (AERA/SAGE, established 1931, bimonthly, DOI 10.3102/) and the Guidelines for Reviewers; make explicit that no fee/APC is stated (do not assert one).
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 66 -> 99; named the verified masked-review label; fee/length/timeline correctly deferred per source map
